nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Initiates outbound voice call via Vapi. Vapi handles voice synthesis + conversation autonomously using the supplied script as the assistant's first turn / system context. Vapi callback hits clx-vapi-transcript-streamer-v1 (already-existing dormant workflow) for transcript chunks and clx-voice-result-webhook-v1 for outcome. DORMANT until Mary configures Vapi account + assistant id + phone number. Mary's choice: Vapi over Retell — see docs/agent/build-phases.md for reasoning.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ assistantId: $env.VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID, phoneNumberId: $env.VAPI_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, customer: { number: $json.to_phone }, assistantOverrides: { firstMessage: $json.script, recordingEnabled: true, metadata: { lead_id: $json.lead_id, client_id: $json.client_id, decision_id: $json.decision_id, agent_action_id: $json.agent_action_id } } }) }}

nodes.name: Vapi Initiate Call
nodes.notes: Vapi assistantId + phoneNumberId come from Mary's Vapi account configuration. assistantOverrides.firstMessage uses our script as the agent's opening line. metadata flows through to webhooks.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.ctx.lead_id, client_id: $json.ctx.client_id, channel: 'voice', direction: 'outbound', content: $json.ctx.script, external_id: $json.call_id, status: 'sent', cost_cents: 5, agent_action_id: $json.ctx.agent_action_id, sent_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, call_id: $('Parse Vapi Response').item.json.call_id }) }}
